name: Bug Triage Pipeline
description: Reproduce the bug, trace it to a root cause, then propose a minimal fix and a regression test.

nodes.name: Reproducer
nodes.description: Reproduces the bug and records exact steps

nodes.name: Root-Cause Investigator
nodes.description: Traces the failure to its root cause

nodes.name: Fixer
nodes.description: Proposes a minimal fix and a regression test
